title: Lead Plain Helix 4 Inch
shortDescription: Premium lead plain helix for vastu energy balancing and directional defect correction.
description: The Lead Plain Helix 4 Inch is specially designed for vastu remedies and energy correction applications. Crafted using high-quality lead metal, this helix helps neutralize negative energies and balance disturbed zones in residential and commercial spaces. It is commonly used in vastu corrections for directional imbalances and energy stabilization.
benefits: Suitable for home and office vastu remedies

title: Brass Plain Helix 4 Inch
shortDescription: Elegant brass plain helix for enhancing positivity, harmony, and vastu balance.
description: The Brass Plain Helix 4 Inch is a premium vastu correction tool designed to improve positive energy flow and spiritual harmony. Brass is traditionally associated with prosperity, purification, and energetic enhancement. This helix helps reduce vastu imbalances while creating a peaceful and uplifting environment in homes, offices, and meditation spaces.
benefits: Ideal for home, office, and meditation areas

title: Zinc Moon Helix 6 Inch
shortDescription: Premium zinc moon helix designed for emotional balance, calmness, and vastu correction.
description: The Zinc Moon Helix 6 Inch is inspired by lunar energy principles and vastu balancing techniques. Crafted from high-quality zinc metal, this helix helps harmonize emotional and environmental energies while reducing negativity. Its unique moon helix design supports calmness, mental clarity, and peaceful surroundings, making it ideal for homes, offices, and spiritual spaces.

title: Copper HII Helix 4 Inch
shortDescription: Premium copper HII helix designed for South-East vastu defect correction and fire energy balancing.
description: The Copper HII Helix 4 Inch is a powerful vastu correction tool specially crafted to balance the Fire element in the South-East direction. Made from premium quality copper, this helix helps neutralize vastu imbalances caused by improper placement of kitchens, toilets, entrances, or fire-related zones. Its spiral design enhances positive energy circulation, financial stability, harmony, and energetic balance in homes and commercial spaces. Ideal for installation on walls, flooring, skirting areas, or concealed vastu correction zones.
benefits: Balances and activates the Fire element
